headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Eli Lilly (LLY) After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: This article considers whether Eli Lilly, at around US$927 per share, is still priced for opportunity or already reflects high expectations. It walks through what the current market price might be implying about the stock. The share price has seen mixed moves recently, with a 1.3% decline over the last week, a 2.2% gain over the past month, a 14.2% year to date decline, an 11.2% return over 1 year, a 146.0% return over 3 years, and a very large 5 year return of about 4x. These moves sit...
